purpose: Introduce the 70-year journey of AI development, covering the origins at the Dartmouth Conference and early foundational milestones that set the stage for modern AI.
Examine the era of expert systems, the causes of two AI winters, and the significance of Deep Blue's victory, illustrating the cycles of hype and disillusionment in early AI research.

indexes.section: 寒冬与复苏：专家系统时代 (1970-1997)

purpose: Describe the paradigm shift to data-driven machine learning, key technical breakthroughs, and landmark applications that redefined AI research between 1997 and 2012.

indexes.section: 机器学习崛起：数据驱动的范式转移 (1997-2012)

purpose: Present the deep learning revolution starting from the 2012 breakthrough, the formal opening of the deep learning era, and the golden age milestones that led to neural networks dominating AI.

indexes.section: 深度学习革命：神经网络的全面胜利 (2012-2019)

indexes: Large Language Models and Future Outlook

purpose: Explore the dawn of the Large Language Model era, focusing on the Transformer architecture, exponential model growth, emergent capabilities, and future outlook for general AI.
